name: Skybridge
description: Builds interactive MCP Apps that render inside Claude and ChatGPT using a full-stack open-source React framework. Ships UI components, routing, and state for agent-facing apps.

skills.name: MCP App Framework
skills.description: Provides a full-stack React framework for building MCP Apps with routing, state, and server components.

skills.name: Interactive UI Components
skills.description: Ships prebuilt interactive UI components that render inside Claude and ChatGPT agent surfaces.

skills.name: In-Chat Rendering
skills.description: Renders live app views directly inside the chat client so users interact without leaving the conversation.
